ajustes.push.denied: Turn on notification permission for this app in your phone or browser settings.
ajustes.push.unsupportedIOS: Add the app to your home screen to get notifications.
ajustes.push.generic: Couldn't turn on notifications. Try again.
ajustes.dayChangeBack: Today will go back to day {day}. Read marks from day {day} onward are removed.
ajustes.dayChangeForward: Today will move to day {day}. Earlier days are marked as read.
ajustes.diarioHelp: When you finish your reading, jot down in a line what spoke to you. You'll find it in Progress › My journey.
ajustes.compartirLecturaLabel: Share my reading with my groups
ajustes.compartirLecturaHelp: Your groups see that you read today (not what you read), and you see theirs. Turn it off whenever you want.
ajustes.reminderIOSNote: On iPhone, add the app to your home screen to receive notifications.
ajustes.reminderHelp: You get a notification at the time you choose. It may take a few minutes.
ajustes.avisosGrupoHelp: We let you know when someone shares a request in one of your groups.
ajustes.recordarRevisarLabel: Remind me to review prayer requests
ajustes.seguimientoHelp: Once a week we remind you if you have active requests you haven't reviewed in over a month.
ajustes.compartirHelp: Invite friends and family to read the Bible together.
ajustes.shareInviteText: I invite you to read the Bible together with Lee Tu Biblia
ajustes.ayudaHelp: Everything Lee Tu Biblia does, explained with examples.
ajustes.misionText: I'm a missionary pastor and I built this app to draw us closer to the Word every day. Your gift is a big help to keep serving full-time. Thank you!
ajustes.deleteError: Couldn't delete the account. Try again.
ajustes.deleteMessage: Your account and all your data (reading, prayers and memberships) are erased. This can't be undone.
common.saveError: Couldn't save. Check your connection and try again.
gate.verseText: Sanctify them in the truth; your word is truth.
gate.loadError: We couldn't load your profile. Check your connection and try again.
onboarding.askName.title: What's your name?
onboarding.askName.subtitle: This is how your groups see you and how it appears on requests you share.
onboarding.auth.tagline: Your daily reading and your prayers, in one calm place.
onboarding.auth.sentCodePost: . Enter it here to sign in.
onboarding.auth.spamHintPre: Don't see it? Check your spam folder, or
onboarding.auth.passwordlessNote: We send a code to your email so you can sign in without a password.
onboarding.auth.loginNotFound: We couldn't find an account with that email. Check the spelling or create an account.
onboarding.auth.sendError: We couldn't send the code. Try again.
onboarding.auth.codeError: Wrong or expired code. Check your email or request a new one.
onboarding.choosePlan.title: Choose a plan
onboarding.choosePlan.activateError: Couldn't activate the plan. Try again.
onboarding.extras.title: Almost there
onboarding.extras.subtitle: Two optional things so your reading doesn't slip away.
onboarding.extras.reminderDesc: A gentle nudge in the morning (07:00).
onboarding.extras.addToHomeDesc: That way you get the reminder and can read offline.
sheet.discardMessage: What you wrote won't be saved.
oracion.title: Prayer
oracion.empty.mine: You don't have any requests yet. Tap + to create your first —private, or shared with a group so others can pray with you.
oracion.empty.groups: Pray alongside others: join a group to see and hold up the requests they share.
oracion.empty.noShared: No shared requests in your groups yet.
hoy.empty.title: Choose a plan to begin
hoy.empty.text: Your daily reading shows up here.
hoy.offline.stale: Offline · this reading is from the last time you opened the app. Connect to see today's.
hoy.offline.fresh: Offline · your check-off is saved and syncs when you're back.
hoy.reprogramarError: Couldn't reschedule. Check your connection and try again.
hoy.imageDownloaded: Image downloaded. Share it wherever you like!
hoy.imageError: Couldn't generate the image. Try again.
hoy.writeNote: Write what God spoke to you today
hoy.renewMessage: You start over from day 1, dated today. Your achievement stays saved.
progreso.offline: Offline · this may be out of date.
progreso.heatmapHint: Each filled square is a day you marked your reading.
progreso.recorrido.title: Your journey
progreso.recorrido.subtitle: Your milestones and numbers in the Word
diario.empty.title: Your journey starts here
diario.empty.text: When you finish your reading in Today, jot down a line of what spoke to you and you'll find it here, day after day.
recorrido.title: Your journey
recorrido.subtitle: How far you've walked in the Word.
recorrido.empty.title: Your journey starts today
recorrido.empty.text: Every day you mark your reading adds up. Here you'll watch your numbers grow and the plans you finish.
recorrido.noPlansYet: You haven't finished a plan yet, but you're on your way. When you complete one, your achievement will live here.
planes.subtitle: One active plan at a time.
planes.changeMsgResume: The new plan starts from day {day}. Your previous progress is saved separately.
planes.changeMsgNew: The new plan starts from day 1. Your previous progress is saved separately.
grupos.createHelp: You'll be the admin. We'll give you a code to invite whoever you want.
grupos.joinHelp: Ask the group's admin for the code.
grupos.notFound: We couldn't find a group with that code.
grupos.empty: You're not in any group yet. Create one or join with a code.
resume.alreadyReading: I was already reading this plan
resume.startInfo: You'll start on day {day} of {total}. Earlier days are marked as read.
resume.startInfoNoTotal: You'll start on day {day}. Earlier days are marked as read.
prayerDetail.noneYet: No one has joined in prayer yet.
prayerDetail.beFirst: Be the first to pray for this.
prayerDetail.answered: This request has already been answered.
prayerDetail.authorWillKnow: {author} will know you're praying for their request.
prayerSheet.saveError: Couldn't save. Check the details and try again.
prayerSheet.noneYet: No one has joined in prayer yet
prayerSheet.noGroups: You're not in any group yet. Join one from Groups to share.
prayerSheet.confirmShareMsgPrivate: This request was private. Once you share it, every member of {group} will be able to see it.
prayerSheet.confirmShareMsg: Every member of {group} will be able to see this request.
reflectionSheet.placeholder: An idea, a phrase… whatever stayed with you
reflectionSheet.editHint: You can edit it today. Tomorrow it's saved as is.
groupDetail.inviteText: I invite you to the group "{name}" on Lee Tu Biblia
groupDetail.noneReadToday: No one has read today yet
groupDetail.shareToSee: Share your reading to see the group's
groupDetail.answeredPct: {pct}% of the group's requests have been answered.
groupDetail.weekPrivate: This week's reading · only you see it
groupDetail.weekAria: {name}: marked their reading {days} of the last 7 days
groupDetail.weekHint: Each dot is a day that person marked their reading. Only those who share appear.
groupDetail.inviteDesc: Share this code with whoever you want to add to the group.
groupDetail.leaveMsg: You'll stop seeing and sharing requests in this group. You can come back with the code.
groupDetail.regenMsg: The previous code will stop working for new invitations.
groupDetail.kickMsg: They'll stop seeing and sharing requests in this group.
groupTestimonies.subtitle: Prayers the group saw answered.
groupTestimonies.empty: No testimonies yet. When someone marks a prayer answered and shares it, it shows up here.
join.linkExpired: The link may have expired or the code was regenerated.
materiales.subtitle: Optional readings that go alongside your Bible. When you turn one on, it appears in Today below the day's reading. You go at your own pace.
materialReader.completed: You finished the catechism. You can review it or start over.
materialReader.saveError: Couldn't save your progress. Check your connection and try again.
materialReader.restartMsg: The marker goes back to question 1 and the rest become unread.
